zh.lifeSummary: 當Landoldo III di Benevento於大約0930年出生在義大利坎帕尼亞貝尼文托貝尼文托時，他的父親Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento27歲，母親Maria di Gaeta17歲。他去世於0968年12月在他的家鄉享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Landoldo III di Benevento于大约0930年出生在意大利坎帕尼亞貝尼文托貝尼文托时，他的父亲Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento27岁，母亲Maria di Gaeta17岁。他去世于0968年12月在他的家乡享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Benevento
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Nunzio, Antonio, Concetta, Donato, Enrico, Fiore, Luigi, Marcello, Orazio, Pasquale.
habitational name from the city or province of Benevento in southwestern Italy.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Landoldo III di Benevento was born about 0930, in Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italy, his father, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, was 27 and his mother, Maria di Gaeta, was 17. He died in December 0968, in his hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Landoldo III di Benevento est né environ 0930, à Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italie, son père, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maria di Gaeta, avait 17 ans. Il est décédé en décembre 0968, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Landoldo III di Benevento um 0930 in Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento 27 und seine Mutter Maria di Gaeta 17. Er starb im Dezember 0968 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Landoldo III di Benevento è nato il circa 0930 nel Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italia, il suo padre, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Maria di Gaeta, aveva 17 anni. Morì nel dicembre 0968, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Landoldo III di Beneventoが約0930年にイタリアカンプアニアベンエベントーベンエベントーで生まれた時，父Landolfo II di Capua e Beneventoは27歳，母Maria di Gaetaは17歳であった。彼は0968年12月に故郷で39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Landoldo III di Benevento(이)가 대략 0930년 이탈리아 캠파니아 베네븐토 베네븐토에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria di Gaeta(은)는 17세였다. 그는 0968년 12월 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Landoldo III di Benevento nasceu aproximadamente 0930, em Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Itália, seu pai, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Maria di Gaeta, tinha 17 anos. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 0968, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Landoldo III di Benevento родился около 0930 г. в местности бинивенто, бинивенто, кампаня, Италия, его отцу по имени Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria di Gaeta, 17. Он умер декабрь 0968 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Landoldo III di Benevento nació aproximadamente 0930, en Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italia, su papá, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Maria di Gaeta, tenía 17 años. Murió en diciembre de 0968, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años.
